sql_array: CREATE TABLE ami_test (instance_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, image_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, access_key VARCHAR(255), sec_token VARCHAR(255), creation_time TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO ami_test (instance_name, image_id, access_key, sec_token) VALUES ('my_instance_of_linux', 'my_new_image', 'AKIAJI7ZL427TI5EDF5A', 'CGI/UMaXf2LRUctaj/HGJ57UNy/t7fNCshh8wpJg');
SELECT *, DB.DBA.AMAZON_CREATE_IMAGE (access_key, instance_name, image_id, sec_token) FROM ami_test WHERE image_id NOT IN (SELECT image_id FROM ami_test WHERE access_key LIKE 'AKIA%');
CREATE TABLE instance_log (log_id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, instance_name VARCHAR(255), log_time TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, status VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO instance_log (instance_name, status) SELECT instance_name, 'Creating Image' FROM ami_test WHERE image_id NOT IN ('my_old_image');
SELECT instance_name, COUNT(*) FROM ami_test GROUP BY instance_name HAVING COUNT(*) NOT IN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM instance_log GROUP BY instance_name);
INSERT INTO ami_test (instance_name, image_id, access_key, sec_token) VALUES ('edge_case_instance', NULL, 'AKIAJI9ZK123456', '');
SELECT instance_name, DB.DBA.AMAZON_CREATE_IMAGE (access_key, instance_name, image_id, sec_token) FROM ami_test WHERE image_id NOT IN (SELECT image_id FROM ami_test WHERE instance_name IS NULL);

SELECT instance_name FROM ami_test WHERE creation_time NOT IN (SELECT MAX(creation_time) FROM ami_test WHERE image_id = 'my_new_image' AND instance_name NOT IN (SELECT instance_name FROM instance_log));
